title: Ri0ts Factories
description: Create massive production factories to automate tasks
body:
![Ri0ts Factories Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3d881a7a81b357837fc2f93d087ef914d60fef3.png)

### About
Create massive production factories to automate tasks

### Features
- Conveyor Belts
- Heater
- Vacuum
- Trash Compactor
- Chute
- Sifter
- Iron Processor
- Copper Processor
- Drill
- Cobblestone Generator
- Ore Refinery
- Ore Miner (Tier 1-3)
- Chip (Module)
- Experience Chip
- Range Chip
- Electric Chip
- Icy Hot Chip
- And other respective crafting materials (Copper Fanblade, Copper Wire, etc.)
### Required Mods
- NeoForge 1.20.4 or 1.20.6
### Optional Mods
- JEI (Just Enough Items)
